name: flow-05-branch-a-achievement-streak
description: Branch A: T87 AchievementGate + T96 StreakManager. T87 idempotent by (userId, achievementId), T96 timezone-aware streak with userTimezoneOffset.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation: T87 history-check before emit, T96 userTimezoneOffset required
Retrieve timezone-aware-streak and achievement idempotency patterns
Break into: T87 (read achievement-records → check (userId, achievementId) → emit if new) + T96 (userTimezoneOffset → localDate → streak increment → streakBonus to T85)
Generate achievement-gate.service.ts (T87) and streak-manager.service.ts (T96). T87 reads history before emit. T96 computes localDate from UTC + offset.
Named check: setnx_before_operation (T87 history check), store_before_enqueue (both), tenant_id_on_writes
Score against iron rules: T87 idempotency, T96 timezone-aware
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
